title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh argues that teaching AI through manual, slow learning with mathematical foundations produces more durable skills than chasing the latest tools. He contends that human-centered foundations allow learners to survive hype cycles and that people, not AI, ultimately shape the technology's trajectory.
